DP.150.0000:
Oh, looking a little tired?
...Oh, no, not you.\r
I meant your Pokémon.\f
If you’d like, I can give a massage
to a Pokémon. Would you like that?
DP.150.0001: Which one needs a little love?\f
DP.150.0002:
Oh!
Hey, I’m not doing anything shady...
DP.150.0003:
Giggle... OK, let’s get started.
OK, sweetie, just relax...\f
DP.150.0005: Drop by again tomorrow if you’d like.
DP.150.0006:
That’s silly! I’d break that Egg
if I tried to massage it!
DP.150.0007:
When I was massaging your Pokémon,
I found this.\f
DP.150.0008:
Oh? You want me to show you how to
massage Pokémon?\f
Tehehe...\f
It’s a secret, of course!\f
Come back again tomorrow!
DP.150.0009:
My sister’s boyfriend is the Scarf
Guy in Pastoria City.\f
They send Mail to each other by
letting Pokémon deliver it.
